description: Slip-on sandals have never looked this good. This blue leather footwear from catwalk is versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to ethnic wear to dresses. The leather panels make it a perfect choice for everyday wear. Upper Two leather straps on the forefoot and midfoot stitched together for a snug Fit Aggressive stitch detailing for added style Lining for added comfort Leather footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort Outsole Criss-cross grooves on the TPU outsole Heel upraised for better posture Sandal Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight Use a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine
